mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.price AS price, deal_stat.sale_price AS salePrice, NVL(deal_stat.discount_rate, 0) AS discountRate, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, p.glb_src AS glbSrc,
CASE WHEN favorite_stat.product_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS favorite
0 AS favorite
FROM products p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, MIN(hp.hot_deal_price) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY hp.hot_deal_price ASC, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0) * 100) DESC NULLS LAST, hp.product_option_id ASC ) AS sale_price, MIN(FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0) * 100)) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY hp.hot_deal_price ASC, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0) * 100) DESC NULLS LAST, hp.product_option_id ASC ) AS discount_rate FROM hot_deals h JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.hot_deal_id = h.id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id WHERE h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at GROUP BY po.product_id ) deal_stat ON deal_stat.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id )
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) favorite_stat ON favorite_stat.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.status = 'ON_SALE' ORDER BY favorite DESC, CASE WHEN p.glb_src IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_id, likes, img_src, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, 0, #{imgSrc}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
